summary: All 6 features tested and verified successfully. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly.

feature_1_currency_breakdown.description: Payments summary endpoint returns currency breakdown (total_por_cobrar_mxn, total_por_cobrar_usd, etc.)

feature_2_bank_account_selector.description: Payment edit dialog includes bank account selector dropdown
feature_2_bank_account_selector.notes: Dropdown shows 'Cuenta Bancaria' with 'Seleccionar cuenta (opcional)...' placeholder

feature_3_currency_conversion_preview.description: Payment edit dialog shows currency conversion preview for non-MXN amounts
feature_3_currency_conversion_preview.notes: Shows 'Equivalente en MXN: $17,500.00' and 'TC: 1 USD = 17.5 MXN' when USD selected

feature_4_consolidated_balance.description: Conciliaciones shows 'Saldo Inicial (Consolidado)' and 'Saldo Final (Consolidado)' with MXN label when 'Todas las cuentas' is selected
feature_4_consolidated_balance.notes: Shows '$937,500.00 MXN' for initial balance and '$1,427,715.05 MXN' for final balance with '2 cuenta(s)'

feature_5_fx_rates_annual_view.description: FX Rates module has 'Vista Anual' tab showing monthly averages
feature_5_fx_rates_annual_view.notes: Shows 'Promedios Mensuales' table with 12 month columns (ENE-DIC) and currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CAD, CNY)

feature_6_transfer_account.notes: 28 transactions successfully transferred from BBVA (MXN) to Citibanamex (USD) account

feature_5b_excel_export_historical_fx.description: ExportPayments function includes tipo_cambio_historico and Monto MXN columns
feature_5b_excel_export_historical_fx.notes: exportPayments function in excelExport.js includes 'TC Histórico' and 'Monto MXN' columns

seed_data_creation: Test payment created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features implemented and working. Bank accounts: BBVA (MXN) id=cashflowmanager-2, Citibanamex (USD) id=cashflowmanager-2. FX rates scheduler running with Banxico + OpenExchange integration.
